title: France ‘surprised’ by Trump criticism over military overflights
summary_full: The US president lashed out at France, saying it did not let "planes headed to Israel, loaded up with military supplies, fly over French territory"
summary_public: The US president lashed out at France, saying it did not let "planes headed to Israel, loaded up with military supplies, fly over French territory"
